                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • Tau.BookIV.Particles.instReprSolenoidalForceMap = { reprPrec := Tau.BookIV.Particles.instReprSolenoidalForceMap.repr }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                def Tau.BookIV.Particles.solenoidal_force_map_data :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                SolenoidalForceMap
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • Tau.BookIV.Particles.solenoidal_force_map_data = { }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Tau.BookIV.Particles.solenoidal_force_map_conj :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  solenoidal_force_map_data.n_compact = 3 ∧ solenoidal_force_map_data.n_non_compact = 2 ∧ solenoidal_force_map_data.total_generators = 5
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Tau.BookIV.Particles.compact_plus_non_compact :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  3 + 2 = 5

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Compact + non-compact = total generators.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  theorem Tau.BookIV.Particles.fourth_gen_excluded_topological :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  fiber_base_homology.rank_total = three_mode_classes.length

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |fermion generations| = 3 from π₁(τ³). Three independent proofs:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  1. H₁(τ³;ℤ) ≅ ℤ³ (rank = 3)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  2. Three primitive winding classes on T²
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  3. Three distinct regions of L = S¹∨S¹
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  structure Tau.BookIV.Particles.TopologicalExclusionProofs :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Type

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  [IV.T171] Three independent proofs of |gen|=3 (formalized).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • n_independent_proofs : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Number of independent proofs.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • h1_rank : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Proof 1: H₁(τ³;ℤ) rank.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • primitive_winding_classes : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Proof 2: primitive winding classes on T².

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • lemniscate_regions : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Proof 3: lemniscate topological regions.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    instance Tau.BookIV.Particles.instReprTopologicalExclusionProofs :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Repr TopologicalExclusionProofs
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • Tau.BookIV.Particles.instReprTopologicalExclusionProofs = { reprPrec := Tau.BookIV.Particles.instReprTopologicalExclusionProofs.repr }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    def Tau.BookIV.Particles.instReprTopologicalExclusionProofs.repr :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    TopologicalExclusionProofs → ℕ → Std.Format
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      def Tau.BookIV.Particles.topological_exclusion_data :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      TopologicalExclusionProofs
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • Tau.BookIV.Particles.topological_exclusion_data = { }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem Tau.BookIV.Particles.topological_exclusion_conj :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        topological_exclusion_data.n_independent_proofs = 3 ∧ topological_exclusion_data.h1_rank = 3 ∧ topological_exclusion_data.primitive_winding_classes = 3 ∧ topological_exclusion_data.lemniscate_regions = 3
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        theorem Tau.BookIV.Particles.all_proofs_agree :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        topological_exclusion_data.h1_rank = topological_exclusion_data.primitive_winding_classes ∧ topological_exclusion_data.primitive_winding_classes = topological_exclusion_data.lemniscate_regions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        All three independent proofs yield exactly 3.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        def Tau.BookIV.Particles.gen_mass_hierarchy_eigenvalue :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        String

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Mass hierarchy from T² Laplacian eigenvalues: λ₁ = 1 (gen 1) < λ₂ = ι_τ⁻² ≈ 8.6 (gen 2) < λ₃ = 1+ι_τ⁻² ≈ 9.6 (gen 3). Leading exponents: gen 2 → 5 = N_generators, gen 3 → 15/2 = N_gen·dim/lobes.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • One or more equations did not get rendered due to their size.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          structure Tau.BookIV.Particles.GenMassHierarchy :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Type

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          [IV.T172] Generation mass hierarchy structure (formalized).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • n_eigenvalues : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Number of eigenvalues.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • n_ordering_relations : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Number of strict ordering relations (λ₁ < λ₂ < λ₃ → 2 relations).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • lightest_generation : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Lightest generation number (crossing-point mode).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            GenMassHierarchy → ℕ → Std.Format

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Repr GenMassHierarchy

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • Tau.BookIV.Particles.instReprGenMassHierarchy = { reprPrec := Tau.BookIV.Particles.instReprGenMassHierarchy.repr }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              def Tau.BookIV.Particles.gen_mass_hierarchy_data :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              GenMassHierarchy
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • Tau.BookIV.Particles.gen_mass_hierarchy_data = { }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem Tau.BookIV.Particles.gen_mass_hierarchy_conj :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                gen_mass_hierarchy_data.n_eigenvalues = 3 ∧ gen_mass_hierarchy_data.n_ordering_relations = 2 ∧ gen_mass_hierarchy_data.lightest_generation = 1
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem Tau.BookIV.Particles.boundary_mode_15_decomposition :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                3 * 5 = 15

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                15 boundary modes = 3 generations × 5 modes/generation = 3 × N_generators. Per generation: 1 charged lepton + 1 neutrino + 3 color-quarks = 5. The 11/4 split gives α = (11/15)²·ι_τ⁴ at 9.8 ppm.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                theorem Tau.BookIV.Particles.em_active_modes :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                15 - 4 = 11

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                15 modes per boundary, 11 EM-active, 4 EM-silent.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                structure Tau.BookIV.Particles.BoundaryMode15 :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Type

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                [IV.P202] 15 boundary mode decomposition structure (formalized).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • n_generations : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Number of generations.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • modes_per_gen : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Modes per generation.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • total_modes : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Total boundary modes.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • em_active : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  EM-active modes.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • em_silent : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  EM-silent modes.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Instances For

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      String

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        def Tau.BookIV.Particles.a_sector_nlo_pmns :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        String

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        [IV.D365] A-Sector NLO PMNS Rotation. The σ-polarity matrix is shared by M_ℓ and M_ν (same eigenvectors), so bare PMNS ≈ identity. All mixing from A-sector (π-generator) rotation. NLO: sin(θ₂₃) = (1−ι_τ⁵)/(1+ι_τ), with W₃(4)=5.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • Tau.BookIV.Particles.a_sector_nlo_pmns = "A-sector NLO PMNS rotation: sin(θ₂₃)_NLO = (1-ι_τ^5)/(1+ι_τ). " ++ "Bare PMNS ≈ identity from shared σ-matrix eigenvectors."
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          structure Tau.BookIV.Particles.ASectorNLOPMNS :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Type

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          [IV.D365] A-sector NLO PMNS rotation structure (formalized).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • window_exp : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Window exponent W₃(4) = 5.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • shared_eigenvectors : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Number of shared eigenvectors from σ-equivariance.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • bare_pmns_free_params : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Number of free parameters in bare PMNS (≈ identity).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            source

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • Tau.BookIV.Particles.a_sector_nlo_pmns_data = { }

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                def Tau.BookIV.Particles.theta23_nlo_window :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                String

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                [IV.T174] θ₂₃ NLO via Window Algebra at +8604 ppm. sin²θ₂₃ = 0.5507, PDG 0.546. Halves LO deviation (+18012 → +8604 ppm).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Equations
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • Tau.BookIV.Particles.theta23_nlo_window = "sin(θ₂₃) = (1-ι_τ^5)/(1+ι_τ), sin²θ₂₃ = 0.5507, " ++ "PDG 0.546, deviation +8604 ppm. NLO factor (1-ι_τ^5) halves LO error."
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Instances For
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  source
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  structure Tau.BookIV.Particles.Theta23NLO :
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Type

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  [IV.T174] θ₂₃ NLO structure.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • window_exp : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Window exponent W₃(4) = 5.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • deviation_ppm : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Deviation from PDG in ppm (+8604).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • lo_deviation_ppm : ℕ

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    LO deviation in ppm (+18012), NLO halves it.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Instances For
